Discover the benefits of Disney Park tickets

Buy with confidence with Disneyland Paris.

Flexible tickets

Choose from dated tickets cancellable up to 3 days before (excluding Basic dated tickets),⁽¹⁾ or undated tickets, valid for 1 year!

Our Price Match Promise

If you find a lower price for the same Disney Park tickets within 24 hours, we'll refund the difference!
Find out more

Access to all the magic

Enjoy all our attractions, shows, Character Encounters, and much more!

Special rates for kids

Available for children aged 3 to 11 years (excluding Basic dated tickets). Under 3's go free!

Embrace the full Disney experience with a 2-Park ticket!

Catch our spectacular shows and iconic daytime parade

Know before you go

Buy your Disney Park tickets in advance!

Disney Park tickets cannot be purchased at the entrance to the Disney Parks, except in certain cases. See details and prices here.

Download our official app

Book a table, buy Disney Premier Access, enter the Disney Parks on the day, and more!

Discover our special rates

Now purchase special-rate tickets for Guests with disabilities online

Starting from 19 November 2024, purchase your special-rate tickets online.​ ​Guests with disabilities can enjoy a 25% reduction on the price of a Disney Park ticket booked online for themselves and one accompanying Guest, subject to the presentation of ​official proof of disability at the ticket counters on the day.

Find out more

Make the magic last around the clock!

Discover our themed Disney Hotels

Book a Disney Hotel + Tickets package and enjoy exclusive advantages... Character Encounters, free parking and even enter the Disney Parks before the official opening times!

Accepted payment methods

Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, PayPal, American Express, Klarna, Diners Club, Discover, JCB, UnionPay, Alipay, WeChat Pay.
Any payment card associated with one of the above networks is accepted. We invite you to check if these networks are mentioned on your payment card.
